message:
feat(frankenpandas): add 7 module-level helpers to prelude (fd90.208 / br-aj46r)

The prelude was missing pandas-equivalent top-level functions for null
checks (pd.isna / pd.isnull / pd.notna / pd.notnull) and three dtype
helpers explicitly referenced in the README:

- isna / isnull / notna / notnull — match pandas' top-level null
  detection functions; README line 957-963 documents the surface
- cast_scalar — README line 359 ("scalar fallback promotes each
  element through cast_scalar()")
- common_dtype — README line 1031 ("follows pandas' promotion rules
  exactly: Bool + Int64 → Int64, ...")
- infer_dtype — README line 771 ("folds common_dtype() across all
  elements to find the narrowest type that fits")

All 7 were exposed at the top-level (line 20 via fp_types) but
missing from the prelude module. User code following pandas idioms
(e.g., `if isna(values).iter().any(|x| *x) { ... }`) would not
resolve from `use frankenpandas::prelude::*`.

Fix:
- Add cast_scalar, common_dtype, infer_dtype, isna, isnull, notna,
  notnull to crate::prelude
- Extend prelude_completeness_compile_guard with name-checks and
  small invocations on a Vec<Scalar>

Verified: 35 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"frankenpandas-ahg","title":"Add reshape and dummy-encoding packet conformance coverage","description":"Testing-conformance audit found pandas reshaping helpers implemented in fp-frame but absent from the packet oracle surface. Add FixtureOperation variants and fixtures for DataFrame.pivot_table (sum/mean/fill/margins/multi-value), DataFrame.stack, Series.unstack, DataFrame.crosstab/crosstab_normalize, DataFrame.get_dummies, and Series.str.get_dummies. Include strict/hardened fixtures for missing cells, null labels, duplicated keys, column ordering, and unsupported agg diagnostics. Evidence: README advertises reshaping and get_dummies parity; fp-frame contains unit tests for these methods; fp-conformance FixtureOperation has melt but no pivot_table/stack/unstack/crosstab/get_dummies variants.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-18T00:26:30.256221759Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T01:32:20.024579654Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T01:32:20.022762095Z","close_reason":"Added reshape and dummy-encoding packet conformance coverage with fmt/check/clippy/focused packet test passing","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","reshape"]}
+{"id":"frankenpandas-aj46r","title":"fd90.208: Add isna/isnull/notna/notnull + dtype helpers to prelude","description":"fd90.208: Add isna/isnull/notna/notnull module-level functions + cast_scalar/common_dtype/infer_dtype to the prelude.

These match pandas' top-level pd.isna() / pd.isnull() / pd.notna() / pd.notnull() functions and operate on &[Scalar]. They're exposed at the top level of frankenpandas (line 20 via fp_types) but missing from the prelude module.

The README also mentions:
- common_dtype (line 1031: "follows pandas' promotion rules exactly: Bool + Int64 → Int64, ..."
- infer_dtype (line 771: "folds common_dtype() across all elements to find the narrowest type that fits")
- cast_scalar (line 359: "scalar fallback promotes each element through cast_scalar()")

All three are user-visible per the README.

Scope:
- Add isna, isnull, notna, notnull to the prelude
- Add cast_scalar, common_dtype, infer_dtype to the prelude
- Extend prelude_completeness_compile_guard

Files: crates/frankenpandas/src/lib.rs.

All 7 were exposed at the top-level via fp_types but missing from the prelude module. Extended prelude_completeness_compile_guard to exercise each. All 35 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-aj8a","title":"[MEDIUM] fuzz: add fuzz_groupby_agg_dispatch target (HashMap+Vec aggfunc routing)","description":"fuzz/fuzz_targets/ has fuzz_groupby_sum but no coverage for the variadic agg dispatch surface that just landed multiple beads (br-715r dict-of-list, br-no1t transform_fn callable, etc.). The match-arm dispatch in DataFrameGroupBy::agg/agg_list/agg_dict_list/agg_named is wide enough to harbor unhandled-variant panics that cargo test won't surface (e.g. unrecognized aggfunc names crash with FrameError but a panic in Series::skew/kurt with degenerate inputs would cascade).

Proposed target: fuzz_groupby_agg.rs with:
1. Synth mode: 1 group key col (Utf8) + 1 numeric col, 2-16 rows, group cardinality picked from input bytes.
2. Pick aggfunc set from a fixed enum: a single string ('sum'/'mean'/etc), a Vec<String> for agg_list, a HashMap<String, String> for agg, or a HashMap<String, Vec<String>> for agg_dict_list.
3. Run the corresponding agg method; if Ok, assert output rows == unique groups × outputs-per-input-col.
4. If Err, assert it is FrameError::CompatibilityRejected (no panic).

New fp-conformance pub fn fuzz_groupby_agg_bytes(input: &[u8]). Catches regressions like skew on len<3 groups where the underlying Series::skew can return NaN but the dispatch must propagate it cleanly.","notes":"cc-pandas triage 2026-04-22: verified parallel agent's commit 3ee01b2 implements the bead spec. fp-conformance adds fuzz_groupby_agg_bytes (lib.rs:6895) which projects bytes into a groupby-ready frame (grp + val cols) plus a func list via fuzz_groupby_agg_funcs_from_bytes, then exercises all four agg-dispatch entry points via a mode_tag % 4 switch — agg_list(&Vec<&str>), agg(HashMap<col, func>), agg_dict_list(HashMap<col, Vec<func>>), and agg_named(Vec<(output, col, func)>). Goes beyond the bead's proposed HashMap + single agg routing. Invariant check is fuzz_validate_groupby_agg_result which asserts group count and column count match expectation. fuzz/Cargo.toml has the matching [[bin]] fuzz_groupby_agg_dispatch block; fuzz_targets/fuzz_groupby_agg_dispatch.rs wraps fp_conformance::fuzz_groupby_agg_bytes under libfuzzer_sys. Tests: 4/4 unit tests pass under rch (fuzz_groupby_agg_bytes_accepts_empty_input + ..._compat_rejected_seed + ..._supported_agg_list_seed + ..._named_aggregation_seed).","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cc-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-22T08:23:52.080293314Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-22T11:51:22.928835630Z","closed_at":"2026-04-22T11:51:22.926346390Z","closed_by_session":"cc-pandas-aj8a-verify","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
